g.text: 📝 docs(architecture): document the new m...
- Describe how `commands::map` groups the four
visualization subcommands behind one module
- Explain that `src/map/` now owns SVG rendering,
layouts, palettes, and element helpers
- Keep the architecture guide aligned with the
current maintenance boundary rules
📝 docs: document map visualizations and ...
- Add the new `aic map` command family to the
architecture and usage docs.
- Describe the SVG outputs for treemap, history,
heat, and activity visualizations.
- Clarify history rendering details and note the
shared `-o` and `-n` flags.
257aa1c
✨ feat(timeline): improve vertical spacin...
325a9dc
✨ feat(map): show commit bodies in the ti...
- Teach git stats parsing to capture commit bodies,
including multiline messages
- Reflow timeline cards to size themselves around
subject, body, and file markers
- Tighten the visual treatment with smaller type,
denser spacing, and updated legend layout
✨ feat(map): add SVG visualizations for r...
- Introduce `aic map` with tree, history, heat, and
activity subcommands, each writing standalone SVG
output.
- Add shared git stats and rendering layers to turn
tracked files, churn, and timestamps into treemaps,
timelines, heatmaps, and contribution grids.
- Extend the CLI docs, help text, and roadmap so
the new visualization workflow is discoverable and
maintainable.
- Teach commit scope detection about `src/map` and
add the `svg` dependency needed to render the
diagrams.
📝 docs(architecture): reflect folderized...
- Update the architecture guide to point at
`src/generator/` instead of the old flat file
- Clarify the module breakdown for generator and
command-backed AI execution paths
- Keep the unreleased notes aligned with the
current internal refactor layout
0c21af3
✨ feat(ai): teach generators to chunk lar...
- Add a command-backed AI engine that shells out to
Claude Code or Codex
- Split oversized commit, PR, and split-plan
requests into chunk summaries, then synthesize one
final result
- Harden command execution and split-plan parsing
with clearer errors and validation
- Cover output sanitization, missing binaries,
non-zero exits, and split-plan correctness with
tests
♻️ refactor: split command and storage ...
- Move commit split handling into dedicated flow,
draft, and group submodules
- Extract push display and planning logic so remote
formatting stays testable
- Rename history persistence to `history_store` and
update command callers
- Tighten config loading and git remote parsing
behind clearer module boundaries
d3a99b9
♻️ refactor: folderize command, config,...
- Split oversized modules into focused submodules
while preserving the existing public paths
- Keep commit, history, config, git, and prompt
behavior intact by re-exporting the same APIs
- Update the architecture docs and release notes to
reflect the new module layout
🐛 fix(ai): make command tests portable a...
- Split the test helper into a small command
descriptor instead of returning a raw path
- Run unix fixtures through `/bin/sh` so scripted
binaries execute the same way in tests
- Keep windows fixtures as direct executables,
avoiding platform-specific test failures
✨ feat(docs): document ollama support and...
- Add Ollama as a first-class provider across the
docs and configuration guidance
- Describe the new interactive split-commit flow,
including its limits and preview loop
- Refresh architecture and roadmap notes so the new
provider and workflow are discoverable
🔧 config: make helper scripts publish at...
- Write temporary scripts first, then rename them
into place to avoid partially initialized
executables.
- Factor executable-script creation into a shared
helper so rebase/editor setup follows the same
safer path.
- Keep test fakes aligned with production behavior
by using the same atomic publish pattern.
dc5707e
✨ feat(cli): make `--yes` fully non-inter...
- Auto-stage all changed files when nothing is
staged, so `--yes` no longer stalls on the staging
prompt
- Push automatically when exactly one remote is
configured, and fail clearly when multiple remotes
would require a guess
- Default the interactive single-remote push prompt
to `Yes` and update the help/config docs to match
- Cover the new staging and push flows with unit
and CLI tests
✨ feat(ai): add anthropic and groq provid...
- Teach the engine registry, config, and model
listing paths about two new hosted providers
- Add an Anthropic Messages API implementation and
Groq OpenAI-compatible defaults
- Refresh docs, help text, and release notes so
setup and overrides match the new providers
- Expand tests to cover provider selection, model
discovery, and request formatting
93da9fb
✨ feat(windows): automate WinGet updates ...
- Add a release-driven workflow that submits new
Windows builds to winget-pkgs
- Wait for the release asset to land and skip
cleanly until the package exists
- Document WinGet as the recommended Windows
install path, with direct downloads as fallback
49bc2ef
📝 docs(release): document PR draft gener...
- Describe the new `aic pr` flow for generating PR
titles and Markdown descriptions from branch
history and diffs
- Spell out base-branch detection, interactive
editing, provider overrides, and history
persistence
- Add the release-note caveat that PR drafting is
generation-only and does not call Git hosting APIs
0fe180b
📝 docs(release): document the new stagin...
- Clarify that `aic` now offers an explicit
no-stage menu with stage-all, picker, and cancel
paths.
- Refresh the docs index, roadmap, and release
notes so the new workflow is easy to find.
- Bump the package version and note the interactive
staging improvement for the 0.0.5 release.
69cf50d
✨ feat(cli): make unstaged commit staging...
- Replace the yes/no staging prompt with a menu
that can stage everything, pick files, or cancel
- Split staging decisions into small testable steps
so the flow is easier to reason about
- Update the usage guide to match the new
interactive behavior
📝 docs: document the richer CLI help sur...
- Add the new 0.0.5 release notes and update the
docs index to point readers at it first
- Show how to use `--help` on top-level and nested
commands for quicker terminal reference
- Explain that config and completion copy now come
from the same shared metadata, so wording stays
aligned
ee2bbe5
✨ feat(cli): add PR draft generation work...
- Add a new `aic pr` command that drafts a PR title
and Markdown body from the branch diff and commit
history.
- Teach the generator to chunk oversized diffs,
synthesize partial summaries, and render PR output
with a dedicated prompt.
- Save PR drafts in history and render them
correctly alongside commit messages and reviews.
- Update docs, help text, and tests to cover
base-ref selection, editor-based editing, and
provider overrides.
